{{Dialogue|Nom Anor|How would Yun-Txiin and Yun-Q'aah view the sacrifice of only one twin?|Kol Yabu|The Twins do not demand sacrifices, but the Balance is all.|Tsavong Lah|That is not what the executor asked. Answer clearly, or I will ask for a reader who does.|Kol Yabu|<nowiki></nowiki>''Offended'' is not the word, Warmaster. The Great Dance would grow unstable.|attr=Nom Anor and Tsavong Lah question Kol Yabu|src=<ref name="Star by Star" />}}
'''Kol Yabu''' was an apostle of the [[Undying Flame]], the cult of the [[Lover Gods]], and a [[Reader (Yuuzhan Vong)|reader]]. Kol Yabu's body had been ritually burned and scarred, so that one side appeared [[Gender/Legends|male]], representing [[Yun-Q'aah]], and another side female, representing [[Yun-Txiin]].<ref name="Star by Star" />

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Yabu served under the [[Priest/Legends|priestess]] [[Vaecta]] aboard [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[Sunulok]]''. The apostle was present in the [[Glory Room]] on the ''Sunulok'' for Lah when [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Executor]] [[Nom Anor]] returned from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after addressing the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. When Anor relayed the revelation that the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] were twin siblings, Yabu pressed him to confirm it. Anor went on to ask how Yun-Txiin and Yun-Q'aah would view the [[Death/Legends|death]] of only one twin. Initially, the Undying Flame apostle avoided the question, saying only that the [[Lover Gods]] did not demand sacrifice. When pressed by Lah, however, Yabu admitted that such an event would cause the [[Great Dance]] to become unstable.<ref name="Star by Star" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kol Yabu first appeared in the [[2001]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'', written by [[Troy Denning]].<ref name="Star by Star" />
